brand.name: Avani Manoria
brand.domain: Software Developer, System Design, AI, Automation

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-white

glassmorphism.usage: Headers, project cards, contact form container

hero_3d.concept: A floating, abstract glass/metallic geometry (like a TorusKnot or a neural network particle mesh) that reacts slightly to mouse movement. Material should be physical with transmission (glass-like) or dark metal reflecting a subtle gold light.
hero_3d.lighting: AmbientLight at low intensity, DirectionalLight angled for sharp highlights, and a subtle PointLight following the cursor.

scroll_animations.concept: Staggered fade-up for texts, slow scale-in for images, parallax effect on floating elements.

smooth_scroll.concept: Momentum scrolling to make the page feel heavy and premium.

hero_background.description: Abstract black and white wavy shapes for deep texture behind text (used if 3D canvas is loading or as fallback)

project_placeholder_1.description: Dark minimalist flatlay of modern tech gadgets

about_image.description: Elegant minimalist workspace in the dark

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'framer-motion' for entrance and interaction animations.
Install 'three', '@react-three/fiber', and '@react-three/drei' for the 3D interactive design elements.
Implement a bespoke typographic logo for 'Avani Manoria' using the Cormorant Garamond font with a subtle glowing gold accent on hover.
Design the layout adopting E1's bento grids and asymmetric spacing principles, maximizing negative space.
Avoid solid background blocks for forms and cards. Use 'Crystal Glassmorphism' (backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-white/5) or strict 1px subtle borders over #050505.
Use Shadcn/UI for the contact form elements but strip any default Vercel-like styling to fit the custom dark luxury theme.
The Contact form must connect to the provided FastAPI backend to save entries into MongoDB.
Implement hover micro-interactions universally (e.g. text color transition, subtle scale, border glow).
